title: carphochaete schaffneri
intro: Carphochaete schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's Carphochaete, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carphochaete schaffneri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Carphochaete schaffneri is commonly prepared into herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in salves and topical creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
